summary: Comprehensive testing of 24x7 Solution multi-page marketing agency website. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All 8 pages tested and working correctly. Forms submit successfully and data persists in MongoDB.
seed_data_creation: Test data created via form submissions during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages and features working correctly. Backend APIs: /api/, /api/contact, /api/audit, /api/newsletter, /api/leads, /api/newsletter/subscribers all tested and passing. Frontend: All 8 pages (/, /services, /case-studies, /case-studies/:slug, /about, /blog, /blog/:slug, /contact, /free-audit, /privacy, /terms) tested with Playwright. Forms (contact, audit, newsletter) submit successfully. Mobile responsiveness verified with hamburger menu working. Brand styling (dark bg #0A0A0F, mint green #00FF88 accents, Syne/DM Sans fonts) correctly applied.

navbar.nav_links: PASS - Services, Case Studies, About, Blog

pages.services: PASS - 6 service sections with icons, descriptions, checklists, market tags, CTAs

pages.case_study_detail: PASS - Stats grid, challenge/strategy/execution, client quote, CTA
